name: docs-quest-scanner
description: Scan merged PRs for documentation impact, review with AI-powered analysis, and create doc issues.

scripts.deploy: rsync -av --exclude='data/' --exclude='node_modules/' --exclude='.git/' --exclude='dist/' . ~/.claude/skills/docs-quest-scanner/ && sed -i '' 's|__TOOL_DIR__|'"$HOME"'/.claude/skills/docs-quest-scanner/|g' ~/.claude/skills/docs-quest-scanner/SKILL.md && echo 'Deployed. Run yarn install in the skill directory if dependencies changed.'
